contentBlocks.title: How does the SVG to AVIF converter work?
contentBlocks.html: Convert vector SVG graphics to compact AVIF raster format. Conversion runs entirely in your browser — files are never sent to a server. No registration, no file limit.

items.question: What is AVIF format?
items.answer: AVIF is a modern image format based on the AV1 codec. It offers excellent compression — files can be up to 50% smaller than JPG while maintaining comparable quality. It supports transparency and wide color gamuts.

items.question: Does AVIF work in all browsers?
items.answer: AVIF is supported by Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. Safari has limited AVIF support.

items.question: Are my files sent to a server?
items.answer: No. Conversion runs entirely in your browser. Files never leave your computer.
